messages.content: How old is Steve burnside
Steve Burnside is 17 years old in Resident Evil: Code Veronica.
How old is Ashley Graham re4
Ashley Graham is 20 years old in Resident Evil 4.
How old is sherry birkin
Sherry Birkin is 12 years old in Resident Evil 2 and 30 years old in Resident Evil 6.
How old is wesker
Albert Wesker is 48 years old in Resident Evil 5.
How old is Chris redfield
Chris Redfield is 35 years old in Resident Evil 5.
How old is Jill valentine
Jill Valentine is 23 years old in the original Resident Evil game.
How old is Claire redfield
Claire Redfield is around 19 to 20 years old in Resident Evil 2.
How old is Leon s Kennedy
Leon S. Kennedy is 21 years old in Resident Evil 2.
How old is Alexia Ashford
Alexia Ashford is 26 years old in Resident Evil CODE: Veronica.
How old is jack krauser
Jack Krauser is in his late 30s or early 40s in Resident Evil 4.
How old is Ramond salazar
Ramond Salazar is around 35-40 years old in Resident Evil 4.
How old is piers nivans
Piers Nivans is in his late 20s or early 30s in Resident Evil 6.
How old is ada Wong
Ada Wong's age is not explicitly stated in the Resident Evil series, but she is generally considered to be in her late 20s or early 30s.
How old is Rebecca chambers
Rebecca Chambers is 18 years old in the original Resident Evil game.
How old is sheva re5
Sheva Alomar is 25 years old in Resident Evil 5.
